_comment_1: Stop hook — nudges Claude to verify completeness before ending a turn. Drop this whole object into ~/.claude/settings.json (replacing or merging with an existing 'hooks' key).
_comment_2: Type 'prompt' runs a nested Claude turn using the given prompt. The result decides whether to continue the parent turn or end it. If you already have other Stop hooks, merge this entry into the Stop[] array rather than overwriting.
_comment_3: Works cross-platform — no shell syntax, pure JSON config.

hooks.prompt: Did you complete the task fully or stop mid-way? If mid-way, continue without waiting for a new message. If complete, confirm with a short summary of what was done and how it was verified.
